# Task: <short title>

- **Status:** todo | in progress | done | blocked
- **Story/Spec:** <link>
- **Jira:** <key, if any>
- **Executor:** agent | human

## Goal

One sentence: what is true when this task is complete.

## To do

- [ ] <step>
- [ ] <step>

## Definition of done

The clear condition to close the task. Link to the story/spec acceptance criteria if any.

## Blockers / dependencies

What is needed before this can be done? Who/what is it waiting on?
